---
name: ✨ Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? Include who it helps and why it matters.

## Proposed solution
Describe your ideal solution.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches or workarounds you’ve tried?

## Feature area
Pick one (or describe your own):
- Signal Engine (TA indicators)
- Dashboard / UI
- Backtesting
- Paper Trading
- Telegram / Notifications
- Webhooks
- API
- Docker / Deployment
- Multi-asset / New pairs
- Leaderboard / Social
- Other

## Effort / urgency
- Nice to have
- I’d use it regularly
- Blocking my use case

## Would you like to implement it?
- If yes, describe how you’d tackle it and whether you’d be willing to open a PR.
